---
title: Mapping Trips to Aunt Zerviah's
---

*"They have all with the exception of Mother Lib and me gone to Aunt Zerviah to spend the evening I tired out every day by dark as I have no place to lie down and rest during the day. Lib and I am going to retire early"*

**Celestia Webster's Diary - November 13, 1867**

## Trips to Aunt Zerviah

```{r}
#Creating Base Map

library(sf)
library(tidygeocoder)
library(USAboundaries)
library(tidyverse)

"Geocode locations"
locations <- geo(c("Conesus"))
locations

"Convert locations to sf object"
locations_sf <- st_as_sf(locations, coords = c("long", "lat"), crs = 4326)
locations_sf

"Get a Base Map"
newyork <- us_counties(states = "New York")

"Reproject the data"
# Find EPSG code for New York
state_plane(state = "NY")

# Project
newyork_proj <- st_transform(newyork, "EPSG:32116")

# Map the data
ggplot() + 
  geom_sf(data = newyork_proj) + 
  labs(title = "Map of New York counties",
       subtitle = "Conesus, Livingston County, New York") + 
  theme_minimal()
```


```
# Mapping with lines
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(leaflet)
library(paletteer)
install.packages("readxl")
library(readxl)

# Reading in Data 

read_excel("Z_locations.xlsx")
read_excel("Z_movements.xlsx")

# Making Objects

movements <- read_csv("Z_movements.xlsx")
locations <- read_csv("Z_locations.xlsx")

#| label: locations_sf
locations_sf <- st_as_sf(locations,
                         coords = c("lng", "lat"),
                         crs = 4326)
```
